text: Flow astral energy - attacks entities with a beam attack.
Spirital flight - allows the master to fly temporarily into the air.
$(o)Condition:$() Player has "Purification" effect (granted for 1 min after killing undead).
Spirit Aura: 25% chance to gain one of: "Regeneration II", "Star Regeneration II", or "Strength II" for 8 sec when hit.
